name: HOME BANCSHARES INC
summary: PART I Company Overview Home BancShares, Inc. (Home BancShares, we, us, HBI or the Company) is a Conway, Arkansas headquartered bank holding company registered under the federal Bank Holding Company Act of 1956. The Companys common stock is traded through the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol HOMB.
